event.name: Secret Ending — Ordinary Lunch
event.description: Tess uses the emergency exit and discovers a continuity without compulsory plot.

text.content: Tess remembers the break-room instructions and opens an ordinary door beside the console. She, Nana Null, and whoever chooses to follow step into a quiet courtyard where lunch is not symbolic. Behind them, the great factions must solve the continuity together without assigning a chosen one.
